mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consult_session (product_id, buyer_id, seller_id, create_time) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, IFNULL(#{createTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.select: SELECT cs.id, cs.product_id, cs.buyer_id, cs.seller_id, cs.create_time, p.title AS product_title, cm.content AS last_message, cm.create_time AS last_message_time FROM consult_session cs LEFT JOIN product p ON p.id = cs.product_id LEFT JOIN consult_message cm ON cm.id = ( SELECT id FROM consult_message WHERE session_id = cs.id ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE cs.buyer_id = #{userId} OR cs.seller_id = #{userId} ORDER BY COALESCE(cm.create_time, cs.create_time) DESC, cs.id DESC
